overall.description: A cinematic journey through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera travels along neon-lit elevated highways, passes through a covered architectural plaza with holographic displays, and encounters giant holographic koi fish swimming through the air. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and vibrant neon aesthetics.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway cutting through a dense futuristic metropolis. Towering glass skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon signage line the route, their reflections shimmering on the wet asphalt. Glowing cyan light strips embedded in the road guide the path forward through the downpour.

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into a covered plaza beneath a sweeping curved architectural structure. The ground changes to illuminated square tiles while the rain continues to fall around the sheltered area. A massive blue holographic koi fish swims gracefully through the air above the pathway, creating a surreal cyberpunk atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The camera executes a sharp downward tilt, transitioning from the covered plaza to a steep descent. The view focuses on the wet asphalt surface below with building lights visible in the peripheral darkness. The blue holographic fish and architectural canopy exit the frame as the perspective shifts dramatically toward the ground.

segments.scene_description: Returning to a level driving perspective, the highway continues through the neon-drenched cityscape. A massive orange holographic koi fish with glowing fins appears and swims alongside the road, matching the camera's speed. The rain creates streaks of light against the dark sky while the city towers rise on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rain-drenched highway into a sheltered, surreal architectural plaza. It begins by gliding along a wet elevated road cutting through a dense metropolis, where towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant neon signage cast shimmering reflections on the asphalt. As the camera moves forward, guided by glowing cyan light strips embedded in the road, the open highway transitions seamlessly into a covered plaza beneath a sweeping curved structure. The environment shifts from asphalt to illuminated square tiles while the rain continues to fall around the perimeter of the shelter. The scene finally opens up to reveal a massive blue holographic koi fish swimming gracefully through the air above the pathway, completing the transition into a surreal cyberpunk atmosphere.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that plunges from a sheltered architectural canopy down toward a rain-slicked highway before leveling out into a high-speed glide through the neon city. It begins with a sharp downward tilt, leaving the blue holographic fish and the covered plaza behind as the perspective shifts dramatically toward the wet asphalt below. As the camera recovers from this descent and returns to a level driving perspective, the surrounding darkness gives way to a dense corridor of towering skyscrapers. The scene then expands as a massive orange holographic koi fish with glowing fins emerges from the cityscape to swim alongside the road, matching the camera's pace. Finally, the view pushes forward through the rain, with streaks of light cutting across the dark sky and vibrant reflections shimmering on the road surface.
